title: tragacantha eriophylla
intro: Tragacantha eriophylla, also known as Mormon tea, is a type of shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and help alleviate symptoms of colds and fever due to its high levels of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Tragacantha eriophylla include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Tragacantha eriophylla can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular choice among those seeking natural remedies.
